description_long: This is a pair of athletic running shoes, primarily dark gray with a white swoosh logo on the side and light gray laces. The shoes show visible signs of wear, with scuff marks, dirt, and creasing on the uppers and midsoles. The outsoles are slightly discolored, especially at the heel and toe, indicating frequent use. The shoes feature a mesh and synthetic upper for breathability, a cushioned midsole for comfort, and a textured rubber outsole for traction. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style, and the interior lining appears padded for additional support. The overall silhouette is streamlined, typical of performance-oriented footwear.
description: A pair of dark gray, well-worn athletic running shoes with white swoosh logos, light gray laces, and visible signs of use and dirt.
description_view_0: Side view showing the white swoosh logo, scuffed midsole, and overall worn appearance.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the standard criss-cross lacing, toe creasing, and dirt on the toe box.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible heel wear, mesh texture, and the swoosh logo partially visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing heel discoloration, outsole wear, and the padded collar.
attribute_logo: White swoosh logo on the side panels of each shoe
